description: Visual Diff Engine - Compare user output against target
context: Beads description: Implement a visual diffing engine that compares user-rendered HTML/CSS output against the target image in real-time during battles. ## Reference Implementation https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wesbos/diff/refs/heads/main/scripts.ts ## Core Features 1. Capture user output (from AppFrame iframe) as an image 2. Compare pixel-by-pixel against target image 3. Generate visual diff showing where differences are 4. Calculate similarity score (0-100%) 5. Update score in real-time (every ~400ms) ## Key Technical Challenges ### Challenge 1: Capturing iframe content The user's code renders in an AppFrame (iframe with srcdoc). We need to capture this as an image. Options: - Use @zumer/snapdom to capture the iframe content - Use html2canvas on iframe document - Consider same-origin requirements ### Challenge 2: Target comparison format Currently targets are static images (`` tags). For pixel comparison: - Option A: Compare against the image directly (load into canvas) - Option B: If targets have code, render them in a hidden DOM element ### Challenge 3: Cross-origin considerations snapdom/html2canvas may have CORS issues with: - External images in user code - Fonts loaded from CDNs - The iframe sandboxing ### Challenge 4: Performance Running comparison every 400ms requires efficiency: - Scale down images before comparison - Debounce/throttle appropriately - Don't block the main thread ## Diff Algorithm (from reference) - Uses weighted pixel differences: R*0.299 + G*0.587 + B*0.114 + A*0.1 - Weights based on human eye sensitivity (green > red > blue) - Ignores very small diffs (<0.005) to handle anti-aliasing - Generates heatmap diff canvas using HSL color ramp - Returns score = (1 - avgDiff) * 100 ## Dependencies - @zumer/snapdom - For DOM-to-image capture - hslToRgb utility function (needs to be added) Metadata: beads_id: battle_mode-0ep beads_status: closed beads_type: epic beads_priority: 1 labels: [] assignee: null notes: null created_at: 2026-01-08T14:10:04.104408-07:00 updated_at: 2026-01-08T15:52:05.334895-07:00 closed_at: 2026-01-08T15:52:05.334895-07:00 dependencies: []
